🎂 HAPPY BIRTHDAY HUMAIRA 🎂

Beautiful Memories 🖼️

💌 Happy Birthday meri pyari Humaira Jan ❤️

Happy Birthday meri pyari Humaira Jan! ❤️ Aaj ka din meri zindagi ke sab se khoobsurat dinon mein se ek hai kyun ke is din meri zindagi mein aane wali sab se qeemti shakhsiyat paida hui thi.

Main tum se bepanah mohabbat karta hoon aur har guzarte din ke saath meri mohabbat aur izzat tumhare liye barhti jati hai. Tum meri zindagi ki khushi, meri taqat aur mere dil ki dharkan ho. Tumhare bina meri zindagi adhoori lagti hai.

Main Allah Ta'ala ka shukar ada karta hoon ke us ne mujhe tum jaisi pyari, samajhdar aur mohabbat karne wali humsafar di.

Meri dua hai ke Allah tumhein hamesha sehat, khushiyan, kamyabi aur lambi zindagi ata farmaye. InshaAllah hum hamesha isi tarah ek dosre ka saath nibhate rahenge.

Tum meri zindagi ho, meri mohabbat ho aur mera sab kuch ho ❤️

I loveeee youuuuuuu jannnn moreeeeee 💗❤️❤️😘😘🫂🫂🫂🌹🌹🫶🏻😘💕💓

— From your husband Ashir 💖
